case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MARTHA GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-13-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MARTHA
